Description:
Ballistics of the OF-530 high explosive fragmentation shell, fired from the 152mm D-1 howitzer, with the variable charge Zh-536. In the PRC the gun and ammunition was copied as the Type 56 152mm howitzer, and the WB006P he-frag shell.

Charge includes 4x top charge bags of 0.53 kg 12/7 grains, 4x bottom charge bags of 0.215 kg 12/7 grains, and a base charge of 0.64 kg 4/1 tubular grains, totalling 3.62 kg. Develops 508 m/s from 2250 kgf/cm^2 (copper crusher gauge, converts to 247.1 MPa). Projectile weighs 40kg, travels 3220 mm, chamber volume is 5.707 L and measures 307 mm long.

Note: web of the auxiliary charge (4/1 grains) have been adjusted to yield approximately correct charge behavior. Actual web ratio should be ~0.33

References:
- ТАБЛИЦЫ СТРЕЛЬБЫ 152-мм ГАУБИЦЫ обр. 1943 г. TC/трау № 155, ШЕСТОЕ ИЗДАНИЕ, министерство оборОнЫ ссср, 1968
- 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
